arts.sum: While Amorim confirmed Altay Bayindir would replace Andre Onana in goal for Sunday's blockbuster clash at the Emirates Stadium, the Portuguese wants to build on last weekend's 2-2 draw at Premier League leaders Liverpool . So I think we have to put the best team, we have to win and we have to follow the last performance.

arts.ttl: Tamworth vs Tottenham: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are aiming to avoid an all-timer of an FA Cup upset when they face National League opposition in Tamworth on Sunday afternoon. Tottenham predicted lineup vs Tamworth (4-3-3) : Kinsky; Spence, Dragusin, Dorrington, Reguilon; Bissouma, Maddison, Sarr; Yang, Lankshear, Moore.

arts.ttl: Tottenham XI vs Tamworth – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur head to Tamworth in a classic FA Cup third-round tie this weekend. Ange Postecoglou’s side travel to the 4,963-capacity Lamb Ground to take on the non-league side, who are seeking a historic giant-killing in a competition made famous by upsets.
